bugs_found.title: Delete confirm button not disabled when wrong name typed
bugs_found.description: SIT-10: The Confirm button in delete dialog is always enabled. Clicking with wrong name does nothing (safe), but spec expects button to be disabled until correct name is typed.
bugs_found.expected: Confirm button disabled until input matches user name
bugs_found.actual: Confirm button always enabled, but click is no-op with wrong name
bugs_found.fix: Added input event listener in bindDeleteActions() to toggle disabled attribute + btn-disabled CSS class based on name match. Added .btn-ghost[disabled] CSS rule for visual feedback.

bugs_found.title: Permission toggle visual state not synced with backend after reload
bugs_found.description: SIT-14: Previously toggle showed inactive after reload. Now FIXED — toggle correctly reflects customPermissions from API.

results.SIT-14: PASS — BUG-002 fixed. Toggle state syncs correctly after reload.

results.SIT-10: PASS — BUG-001 FIXED. Confirm button disabled with empty input, disabled with wrong name, enabled with correct name. Delete succeeds. No console errors.

results.overall_verdict: PASS — All bugs fixed. BUG-001 FIXED, BUG-002 FIXED. SIT pass rate: 100% (14/14).
